best_fully_parallel_standard_cta.read: Fits a normal HIP block, but the reduction is small and dense active-group epilogue is near/over the LDS target.

cube4.role: computes dk = ds^T * q and writes mm4ResWorkspaceGm

cube5.role: computes dv = p^T * dy and writes mm5ResWorkspaceGm

scatter_add.role: reads mm4/mm5 workspace into UB/vector buffers and atomic-copies rows into original/compressed KV gradients

ascend_sasg_source_read.pipeline: Gather/Cube12/Process/Cube345/Scatter with ping-pong preload and overlap; the scatter stage is a pipeline consumer, not a standalone raw selected-row HBM slab.

rejected.reason: T32 H64 score recompute needs about 8192 threads if parallel; serializing into 8 token batches recreates the row-leader slowdown.
Measured 114-186 ms despite large modeled write reduction.
Pays an HBM round trip over a huge selected-partial stream; previous detached scatter was about 10 ms by itself.

retained_next_surface.name: ascend_like_compact_page_producer_consumer
retained_next_surface.contract: q,dO,compressed/shared KV,indices,lse/sink -> query-major MFMA score/prob/scaled-dP -> dQ plus compact grouped dKV page -> small final fold/scatter
retained_next_surface.critical_difference_from_failed_detached: The page must be compact by compressed group/tile before HBM. It cannot be one row per selected (token,slot,D) contribution.
retained_next_surface.first_runtime_gate: Build a source-boundary producer that emits compact page rows for T32 selected512 or a two-level T4/T8 producer-consumer page that merges to the same compact T32 groups, then compare full sparse-attention backward S4096 latency against the 11.13 ms Triton boundary and 8.8 ms dKV atomic wall.

materialized_e2e_tflops.reason: This is a kernel-surface feasibility decision. No e2e TorchTitan A/B is justified until the source-boundary sparse-attention latency improves in isolation.
